```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(lubridate)
library(DEoptim)
```


```{r}
# =====================================================================
# 1. MATHEMATICAL & OBJECTIVE FUNCTIONS (Joint Statistics / Lag-0)
# =====================================================================

# --- 2-Parameter Models (H_inf and shape) ---
# Based on Equation 10
H_W_joint_2p <- function(k, H_inf, k_star, q_k_star, a) {
  power_exponent <- (k / k_star)^a
  base_fraction <- 1 - (q_k_star / H_inf)
  base_fraction <- ifelse(base_fraction < 0, 1e-9, base_fraction) # Prevent NaN
  H_inf * (1 - base_fraction ^ power_exponent)
}

# Based on Equation 11
H_L_joint_2p <- function(k, H_inf, k_star, q_k_star, b) {
  ln_numerator <- log(1 + b * k)
  ln_denominator <- log(1 + b * k_star)
  power_exponent <- ln_numerator / ln_denominator
  base_fraction <- 1 - (q_k_star / H_inf)
  base_fraction <- ifelse(base_fraction < 0, 1e-9, base_fraction)
  H_inf * (1 - base_fraction ^ power_exponent)
}

# --- 1-Parameter Models (Fixing H_inf = 1) ---
H_W_joint_1p <- function(k, k_star, q_k_star, a) {
  H_inf <- 0.99
  power_exponent <- (k / k_star)^a
  base_fraction <- 1 - (q_k_star / H_inf)
  base_fraction <- ifelse(base_fraction < 0, 1e-9, base_fraction)
  H_inf * (1 - base_fraction ^ power_exponent)
}

H_L_joint_1p <- function(k, k_star, q_k_star, b) {
  H_inf <- 0.99
  ln_numerator <- log(1 + b * k)
  ln_denominator <- log(1 + b * k_star)
  power_exponent <- ln_numerator / ln_denominator
  base_fraction <- 1 - (q_k_star / H_inf)
  base_fraction <- ifelse(base_fraction < 0, 1e-9, base_fraction)
  H_inf * (1 - base_fraction ^ power_exponent)
}

# --- FITTING FUNCTIONS (MSE) ---
mse_W_joint_2p <- function(par, k, y, k_star, q_k_star) mean((y - H_W_joint_2p(k, par[1], k_star, q_k_star, par[2]))^2, na.rm=TRUE)
mse_L_joint_2p <- function(par, k, y, k_star, q_k_star) mean((y - H_L_joint_2p(k, par[1], k_star, q_k_star, par[2]))^2, na.rm=TRUE)
mse_W_joint_1p <- function(par, k, y, k_star, q_k_star) mean((y - H_W_joint_1p(k, k_star, q_k_star, par[1]))^2, na.rm=TRUE)
mse_L_joint_1p <- function(par, k, y, k_star, q_k_star) mean((y - H_L_joint_1p(k, k_star, q_k_star, par[1]))^2, na.rm=TRUE)

# --- VALIDATION FUNCTION (SMAPE) ---
calculate_smape <- function(actual, predicted) {
  mask <- !is.na(actual) & !is.na(predicted)
  if (sum(mask) == 0) return(NA)
  a <- actual[mask]
  p <- predicted[mask]
  numerator <- abs(p - a)
  denominator <- (abs(a) + abs(p)) / 2
  return(mean(numerator / (denominator + 1e-9)) * 100)
}
```


```{r}
# =====================================================================
# 2. HELPER: READ AND FORMAT SINGLE STATION
# =====================================================================
read_station_data <- function(file_path) {
  df <- data.table::fread(file_path, skip = 21, col.names = "precip", data.table = FALSE)
  df$precip[df$precip == -999] <- NA
  
  header_lines <- readLines(file_path, n = 21)
  start_date_str <- sub("Start datetime: ", "", grep("^Start datetime:", header_lines, value = TRUE))
  end_date_str <- sub("End datetime: ", "", grep("^End datetime:", header_lines, value = TRUE))
  
  start_ts <- ymd_h(start_date_str)
  end_ts <- ymd_h(end_date_str)
  df$date <- seq(start_ts, end_ts, by = "hour")
  
  return(as.data.table(df))
}


# =====================================================================
# 3. CORE BIVARIATE PROCESSING FUNCTION
# =====================================================================

process_station_pair <- function(file1, file2, pair_dir) {
  
  stat1_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file1))
  stat2_name <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file2))
  pair_name <- paste0(stat1_name, "_vs_", stat2_name)
  
  tryCatch({
    # --- 3.1 Read Stations ---
    dt1 <- read_station_data(file1)
    dt2 <- read_station_data(file2)
    
    st1_start <- min(dt1$date)
    st1_end <- max(dt1$date)
    st2_start <- min(dt2$date)
    st2_end <- max(dt2$date)
    
    setnames(dt1, "precip", "p1")
    setnames(dt2, "precip", "p2")
    
    # --- 3.2 Overlap Timeline & Data Loss Calculation ---
    overlap_start <- max(st1_start, st2_start)
    overlap_end <- min(st1_end, st2_end)
    
    if (overlap_start > overlap_end) {
      stop("No overlapping time period between these two stations.")
    }
    
    # Calculate exactly how many hours are "deleted" due to the merge
    st1_deleted_start_hrs <- as.numeric(difftime(overlap_start, st1_start, units = "hours"))
    st1_deleted_end_hrs <- as.numeric(difftime(st1_end, overlap_end, units = "hours"))
    
    st2_deleted_start_hrs <- as.numeric(difftime(overlap_start, st2_start, units = "hours"))
    st2_deleted_end_hrs <- as.numeric(difftime(st2_end, overlap_end, units = "hours"))
    
    # Create the strict, continuous hourly backbone for the overlapping period
    master_timeline <- data.table(date = seq(overlap_start, overlap_end, by = "hour"))
    
    # Left join both stations onto the master timeline
    merged_df <- merge(master_timeline, dt1, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
    merged_df <- merge(merged_df, dt2, by = "date", all.x = TRUE)
    
    # Ensure ordering and assign hour index
    merged_df <- merged_df[order(date)]
    merged_df[, hour_index := 0:(.N - 1)]
    
    # --- 3.3 Compile Full Metadata Object ---
    station_metadata_obj <- list(
      Station_1_Info = list(
        Station = stat1_name,
        Original_Start = st1_start,
        Original_End = st1_end,
        Original_Theoretical_Hours = nrow(dt1),
        Deleted_Hours_Before_Overlap = st1_deleted_start_hrs,
        Deleted_Hours_After_Overlap = st1_deleted_end_hrs,
        Total_Deleted_Hours = st1_deleted_start_hrs + st1_deleted_end_hrs
      ),
      Station_2_Info = list(
        Station = stat2_name,
        Original_Start = st2_start,
        Original_End = st2_end,
        Original_Theoretical_Hours = nrow(dt2),
        Deleted_Hours_Before_Overlap = st2_deleted_start_hrs,
        Deleted_Hours_After_Overlap = st2_deleted_end_hrs,
        Total_Deleted_Hours = st2_deleted_start_hrs + st2_deleted_end_hrs
      ),
      Merged_Timeline_Info = list(
        Overlap_Start = overlap_start,
        Overlap_End = overlap_end,
        Common_Timeline_Hours = nrow(master_timeline),
        St1_NAs_in_Common_Timeline = sum(is.na(merged_df$p1)),
        St2_NAs_in_Common_Timeline = sum(is.na(merged_df$p2)),
        Both_NA_Simultaneously = sum(is.na(merged_df$p1) & is.na(merged_df$p2))
      )
    )
    
    # --- 3.4 Aggregation & Cross-Correlation ---
    all_k <- c(1:12, 24, 24*2, 24*3, 24*4, 24*5, 24*9, 24*10)
    summary_stats_list <- vector("list", length(all_k))
    
    for (i in seq_along(all_k)) {
      agg_length <- all_k[i]
      
      if (agg_length < 6) { max_na <- 0 }
      else if (agg_length >= 6 & agg_length <= 12) { max_na <- 1 }
      else { max_na <- min(ceiling(agg_length / 5), agg_length - 1) }
      
      agg_dt <- merged_df[, .(
        n_total = .N,
        n_na_1 = sum(is.na(p1)),
        n_na_2 = sum(is.na(p2)),
        sum_p1 = sum(p1, na.rm = TRUE),
        sum_p2 = sum(p2, na.rm = TRUE)
      ), by = .(bin_id = hour_index %/% agg_length)]
      
      valid_bins <- agg_dt[n_total == agg_length & n_na_1 <= max_na & n_na_2 <= max_na]
      
      valid_bins[, mean_p1 := sum_p1 / (n_total - n_na_1)]
      valid_bins[, mean_p2 := sum_p2 / (n_total - n_na_2)]
      
      if(nrow(valid_bins) > 5) { 
        rho_all <- cor(valid_bins$mean_p1, valid_bins$mean_p2, method = "pearson")
        wet_bins <- valid_bins[mean_p1 > 0 & mean_p2 > 0]
        rho_wet <- if(nrow(wet_bins) > 5) cor(wet_bins$mean_p1, wet_bins$mean_p2, method = "pearson") else NA
      } else {
        rho_all <- NA
        rho_wet <- NA
      }
      
      summary_stats_list[[i]] <- data.frame(k_hours = agg_length, n_valid_pairs = nrow(valid_bins), rho_all = rho_all, rho_wet = rho_wet)
    }
    
    final_summary_df <- data.table::rbindlist(summary_stats_list)
    
    # --- 3.5 DEoptim Model Fitting (Correlation Scaling) ---
    fit_data <- final_summary_df %>% filter(k_hours >= 24) %>% arrange(k_hours)
    k_obs <- fit_data$k_hours
    k_star <- 24
    
    stats_to_fit <- c("rho_all", "rho_wet")
    de_ctrl <- DEoptim.control(trace = FALSE, itermax = 1000, NP = 50, reltol = 1e-11, steptol = 500)
    all_fits_list <- list()
    
    for (stat in stats_to_fit) {
      y_obs <- fit_data[[stat]]
      if (all(is.na(y_obs))) next
      
      q_k_star <- fit_data[[stat]][fit_data$k_hours == k_star][1]
      if (is.na(q_k_star) || q_k_star <= 0) next
      
      lower_H_inf <- min(q_k_star + 1e-6, 0.9999)
      max_H_inf <- 1.0
      
      fit_W_2p <- DEoptim(mse_W_joint_2p, lower = c(lower_H_inf, 1e-6), upper = c(max_H_inf, 10), k = k_obs, y = y_obs, k_star = k_star, q_k_star = q_k_star, control = de_ctrl)
      fit_L_2p <- DEoptim(mse_L_joint_2p, lower = c(lower_H_inf, 1e-6), upper = c(max_H_inf, 10), k = k_obs, y = y_obs, k_star = k_star, q_k_star = q_k_star, control = de_ctrl)
      
      fit_W_1p <- DEoptim(mse_W_joint_1p, lower = 1e-6, upper = 10, k = k_obs, y = y_obs, k_star = k_star, q_k_star = q_k_star, control = de_ctrl)
      fit_L_1p <- DEoptim(mse_L_joint_1p, lower = 1e-6, upper = 10, k = k_obs, y = y_obs, k_star = k_star, q_k_star = q_k_star, control = de_ctrl)
      
      res_row <- data.frame(
        Statistic = stat, 
        Model = c("Weibull_2p", "PowerLaw_2p", "Weibull_1p", "PowerLaw_1p"), 
        H_inf = c(fit_W_2p$optim$bestmem[1], fit_L_2p$optim$bestmem[1], 1, 1), 
        Param_a = c(fit_W_2p$optim$bestmem[2], NA, fit_W_1p$optim$bestmem[1], NA), 
        Param_b = c(NA, fit_L_2p$optim$bestmem[2], NA, fit_L_1p$optim$bestmem[1]), 
        MSE_Fitting = c(fit_W_2p$optim$bestval, fit_L_2p$optim$bestval, fit_W_1p$optim$bestval, fit_L_1p$optim$bestval)
      )
      all_fits_list[[stat]] <- res_row
    }
    
    optimized_parameters_df <- bind_rows(all_fits_list)
    
    # --- 3.6 Evaluate Validation Data (USING SMAPE) ---
    validation_data <- final_summary_df %>% filter(k_hours < 24) %>% arrange(k_hours)
    empirical_24h <- final_summary_df %>% filter(k_hours == k_star)
    
    validation_results_list <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(optimized_parameters_df)), function(i) {
      current_fit <- optimized_parameters_df[i, ]
      actual_vals <- validation_data[[current_fit$Statistic]]
      q_k_star_val <- empirical_24h[[current_fit$Statistic]]
      
      if (all(is.na(actual_vals))) { 
          current_fit$smape_validation <- NA
          return(current_fit)
      }
      
      predicted_vals <- switch(current_fit$Model,
                               "Weibull_2p"  = H_W_joint_2p(validation_data$k_hours, current_fit$H_inf, k_star, q_k_star_val, current_fit$Param_a),
                               "PowerLaw_2p" = H_L_joint_2p(validation_data$k_hours, current_fit$H_inf, k_star, q_k_star_val, current_fit$Param_b),
                               "Weibull_1p"  = H_W_joint_1p(validation_data$k_hours, k_star, q_k_star_val, current_fit$Param_a),
                               "PowerLaw_1p" = H_L_joint_1p(validation_data$k_hours, k_star, q_k_star_val, current_fit$Param_b),
                               rep(NA, length(validation_data$k_hours))
      )
      current_fit$smape_validation <- calculate_smape(actual_vals, predicted_vals)
      return(current_fit)
    })
    
    final_evaluated_models <- bind_rows(validation_results_list)
    best_models <- final_evaluated_models %>% group_by(Statistic) %>% slice_min(order_by = smape_validation, n = 1) %>% ungroup()
    
    # --- 3.7 Generate All Predictions ---
    k_predict <- c(0.25, sort(unique(final_summary_df$k_hours)))
    
    predicted_list <- lapply(unique(optimized_parameters_df$Statistic), function(stat) {
      q_k_star_val <- final_summary_df[[stat]][final_summary_df$k_hours == k_star]
      actual_vals <- final_summary_df[[stat]][match(k_predict, final_summary_df$k_hours)]
      params <- optimized_parameters_df %>% filter(Statistic == stat)
      df_stat <- data.frame(Scale_k = k_predict, Statistic = stat, Actual = actual_vals)
      
      for (i in seq_len(nrow(params))) {
        m_name <- params$Model[i]
        predicted_vals <- switch(m_name,
                                 "Weibull_2p"  = H_W_joint_2p(k_predict, params$H_inf[i], k_star, q_k_star_val, params$Param_a[i]),
                                 "PowerLaw_2p" = H_L_joint_2p(k_predict, params$H_inf[i], k_star, q_k_star_val, params$Param_b[i]),
                                 "Weibull_1p"  = H_W_joint_1p(k_predict, k_star, q_k_star_val, params$Param_a[i]),
                                 "PowerLaw_1p" = H_L_joint_1p(k_predict, k_star, q_k_star_val, params$Param_b[i]),
                                 rep(NA, length(k_predict)))
        df_stat[[m_name]] <- predicted_vals
      }
      return(df_stat)
    })
    
    all_predictions_df <- bind_rows(predicted_list)
    
    # --- 3.8 Export Results ---
    folder_path <- file.path(pair_dir, pair_name)
    dir.create(folder_path, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
    
    saveRDS(final_summary_df, file.path(folder_path, "cross_corr_summary.rds"))
    saveRDS(optimized_parameters_df, file.path(folder_path, "optimized_parameters.rds"))
    saveRDS(final_evaluated_models, file.path(folder_path, "final_evaluated_models.rds"))
    saveRDS(best_models, file.path(folder_path, "best_models.rds"))
    saveRDS(all_predictions_df, file.path(folder_path, "all_predictions.rds"))
    
    # Save the requested detailed metadata
    saveRDS(station_metadata_obj, file.path(folder_path, "extra_metadata.rds"))
    
    return(paste("Success:", pair_name))
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    return(paste("FAILED:", pair_name, "-", conditionMessage(e)))
  }) 
}
```






```{r}
# =====================================================================
# 4. DIRECTORY SETUP & PAIRWISE EXECUTION
# =====================================================================
gdrive_path <- paste(LETTERS[file.exists(paste0(LETTERS, ":/My Drive"))], ":/My Drive", sep = "")
project_path <- file.path(gdrive_path, "Academic_git/DownScaling")

data_dir_name <- "QC_d data - Germany" 
data_dir <- file.path(gdrive_path, "General_Data/GSDR", data_dir_name)
pair_dir <- file.path(project_path, "CrossCorrelation", data_dir_name, "Testing") 

station_files <- list.files(path = data_dir, pattern = "\\.txt$", full.names = TRUE)

# Creating pairs (for demonstration, pairing the 1st station with the 2nd and 3rd)
target_station <- station_files[1]
compare_stations <- station_files[2:3]

cat("Starting pairwise processing...\n\n")
results <- list()

for (file2 in compare_stations) {
  cat("Processing pair:", basename(target_station), "vs", basename(file2), "...")
  res <- process_station_pair(target_station, file2, pair_dir)
  results[[basename(file2)]] <- res
  cat(ifelse(grepl("^Success", res), " Done\n", paste("\n -> Error:", res, "\n")))
}

cat("\nProcessing Complete! Summary:\n")
print(table(grepl("^Success", unlist(results))))
```













```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

plot_cross_correlation_ggplot <- function(pair_folder_path, stat = "rho_all") {
  
  # 1. Load data
  preds_file <- file.path(pair_folder_path, "all_predictions.rds")
  best_file <- file.path(pair_folder_path, "best_models.rds")
  
  if (!file.exists(preds_file) || !file.exists(best_file)) {
    stop("Data files not found in the specified folder.")
  }
  
  preds_df <- readRDS(preds_file)
  best_models <- readRDS(best_file)
  
  # 2. Extract specific statistic
  df_stat <- preds_df %>% filter(Statistic == stat)
  df_stat<-df_stat[2:20,]
  # Helper to set the correct math expression for the axis
  get_stat_expr <- function(s) {
    if (s %in% c("rho_all", "rho_wet")) return(bquote(rho^{(k)}))
    return(bquote(.(s)))
  }
  metric_expr <- get_stat_expr(stat)
  
  # 3. Extract Best Model
  best_mod <- best_models %>% filter(Statistic == stat) %>% pull(Model)
  best_mod_label <- gsub("Weibull_", "Wei-", gsub("PowerLaw_", "Lom-", best_mod))
  
  # For cross-correlation, we fit all 4 models
  active_models <- c("PowerLaw_1p", "PowerLaw_2p", "Weibull_1p", "Weibull_2p")
  
  # 4. Pivot models into long format for line aesthetics
  df_lines <- df_stat %>%
    select(Scale_k, all_of(active_models)) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = -Scale_k, names_to = "Model", values_to = "Value") %>%
    mutate(Model = factor(Model, 
                          levels = c("PowerLaw_1p", "PowerLaw_2p", "Weibull_1p", "Weibull_2p"),
                          labels = c("Lom-1p", "Lom-2p", "Wei-1p", "Wei-2p"))) %>%
    filter(!is.na(Value))
  
  # 5. Phase points for empirical data
  df_points <- df_stat %>%
    filter(!is.na(Actual)) %>%
    mutate(Phase = factor(ifelse(Scale_k >= 24, "Calib. data", "Valid. data"),
                          levels = c("Calib. data", "Valid. data")))
  
  # Format pair name for the title
  pair_name <- gsub("_vs_", " vs ", basename(pair_folder_path))
  
  # 6. Build the ggplot
  p_scale <- ggplot() +
    # Reference lines at k=1 and k=24
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(24), linetype = "dashed", color = "darkgray", linewidth = 0.8) +
    
    # Prediction lines
    geom_line(data = df_lines, aes(x = Scale_k, y = Value, color = Model, linetype = Model), linewidth = 1) +
    
    # Empirical points
    geom_point(data = df_points, aes(x = Scale_k, y = Actual, fill = Phase), 
               shape = 21, color = "transparent", size = 2.5) +
    
    # Scales and Axes
    scale_x_log10(breaks = c(1, 2, 4, 12, 24, 48, 96, 240)) +
    scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1.05), breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.2)) +
    
    # Manual mappings for colors and linetypes
    scale_color_manual(name = "", values = c("Lom-1p" = "red", "Lom-2p" = "red", "Wei-1p" = "blue", "Wei-2p" = "blue")) +
    scale_linetype_manual(name = "", values = c("Lom-1p" = "solid", "Lom-2p" = "dashed", "Wei-1p" = "solid", "Wei-2p" = "dashed")) +
    scale_fill_manual(name = "", values = c("Calib. data" = "black", "Valid. data" = "orange")) +
    
    # Labels
    labs(
      title = paste("St. ID:", pair_name), 
      subtitle = paste("Best Model:", best_mod_label), 
      x = "Temporal scale, k [h]", 
      y = metric_expr
    ) +
    
    # Theme configuration
    theme_bw() + 
    theme(
      panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "gray70"),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.background = element_blank(), 
      legend.key = element_blank(),        
      legend.spacing.y = unit(0, "pt"),
      legend.margin = margin(t = 2, r = 5, b = 2, l = 5)
    ) +
    
    # Legend guide ordering
    guides(
      fill = guide_legend(order = 1, override.aes = list(size = 3)),
      color = guide_legend(order = 2),
      linetype = guide_legend(order = 2)
    )
  
  return(p_scale)
}

# Example Usage:
pair_dir <- pair_dir
my_plot <- plot_cross_correlation_ggplot(file.path(pair_dir, "DE_00003_vs_DE_00020"))
 print(my_plot)
```
